safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that screenshot/message material is served but full phone download, subscriber/account data, and final MG11 remain outstanding.
safePositionToday: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that screenshot/message material is served but full phone download, subscriber/account data, and final MG11 remain outstanding.
askCourtToRecord: Outstanding disclosure: Full phone download; Subscriber / account data; Full message export; Call logs; Final signed MG11; MG6C clarification on unused material.
Invite the court to order disclosure by a fixed date with a review hearing.
disclosureTimetable: The defence invites the court to order disclosure of Full phone download; Subscriber / account data; Full message export; Call logs; Final signed MG11; MG6C clarification on unused material by [date] with a review on [date]. Position remains provisional.
doNotOverstate: Do not state the defendant sent messages unless attribution is served and safe.
